BackendId.description: Storage backend identifier assigned by the server-managed backend registry.
BackendId.name: id

MediaObjectId.description: Media object identifier assigned by the media object registry.
MediaObjectId.name: id

BackendConfig.description: Exactly one property must be present and match the backend type.

mediaObjectId.description: ID of the media object to import

title.description: Track title; falls back to mediaObjectId if empty

dryRun.description: When true, calculate matching objects and per-object outcomes without persisting lifecycle changes.

contentHash.description: Content hash shared by every object in the group.

backendId.description: Backend filter used to calculate this duplicate report, omitted for all backends.

lifecycleState.description: New metadata lifecycle state for the media object. Deleted objects cannot be moved back to a non-deleted state.

MediaObjectSelectionFilter.description: Selects media objects by exactly one metadata filter.

backendId.description: Backend filter used to calculate this stats response, omitted for all backends.

byVerificationStatus.description: Counts by latest verification state. Includes verified, failed, and unknown buckets.

SearchResultKind.description: The entity kind of a catalog search result item.

query.description: The search query string as submitted.

items.description: Ordered result items: artists first, then albums, then tracks.

index.description: Zero-based position of this item in the request array

CatalogUpdateArtistRequest.description: Partial update for an artist. Only provided fields are changed.

name.description: Display name. Must not be empty if provided.

sortName.description: Sort key for the artist name. May be empty to clear.

CatalogUpdateAlbumRequest.description: Partial update for an album. Only provided fields are changed.

title.description: Album title. Must not be empty if provided.

sortTitle.description: Sort key for the album title. May be empty to clear.

artistId.description: ID of the owning artist. Must reference an existing artist.

CatalogUpdateTrackRequest.description: Partial update for a track. Only provided fields are changed.

title.description: Track title. Must not be empty if provided.

sortTitle.description: Sort key for the track title. May be empty to clear.

artistId.description: ID of the performing artist. Must reference an existing artist.

albumId.description: ID of the parent album. Empty string removes album association.

SetPlaylistTracksRequest.description: Atomically replaces the ordered track list of a playlist.

trackIds.description: Ordered list of track IDs. Replaces the current track list atomically. An empty array clears the playlist.

CatalogRelinkTrackRequest.description: Replace the media object linked to a catalog track.

mediaObjectId.description: ID of the new media object. Must be active and of kind original_audio or transcoded_audio.

tracks.description: Ordered list of full track objects for the playlist

CatalogStats.description: Metadata-only aggregate entity counts for the catalog.

albumCount.description: Number of albums attributed to this artist.

trackCount.description: Number of tracks attributed to this artist.

CatalogArtistStatsBreakdown.description: Per-artist album and track count breakdown.

artists.description: Ordered list of per-artist stat rows.

artistId.description: Identifier of the artist who owns this album.

trackCount.description: Number of tracks belonging to this album.

albums.description: Ordered list of per-album stat rows.

trackCount.description: Number of track entries in this playlist (duplicates counted separately).

playlists.description: Ordered list of per-playlist stat rows.

RecentItemKind.description: Catalog entity kind for a recent timeline item.

RecentCatalogItem.description: One recently-added catalog entity in the unified timeline. Exactly one entity payload is present based on kind.

addedAt.description: Creation timestamp used for ordering the unified timeline.

items.description: Recent artist, album, track, and playlist entries ordered newest-first.

UpdatedCatalogItem.description: One recently-updated catalog entity in the unified timeline. Exactly one entity payload is present based on kind.

updatedAt.description: Update timestamp used for ordering the unified timeline.

items.description: Updated artist, album, track, and playlist entries ordered newest-first.

post.summary: Create album
Create artist
Import media object as a catalog track
Create track

get.description: Returns a bounded media-object metadata page filtered by exactly one of backendId, contentHash, verificationStatus, lifecycleState, or assetKind.

parameters.description: List media objects stored on this backend. Mutually exclusive with contentHash, verificationStatus, lifecycleState, and assetKind.
parameters.name: backendId

parameters.description: List media objects with this content hash. Mutually exclusive with backendId, verificationStatus, lifecycleState, and assetKind.
parameters.name: contentHash

parameters.description: List media objects by their latest verification state; unknown means no verification result has been recorded yet. Mutually exclusive with backendId, contentHash, lifecycleState, and assetKind.
parameters.name: verificationStatus

parameters.description: List media objects by metadata lifecycle state. Mutually exclusive with backendId, contentHash, verificationStatus, and assetKind.
parameters.name: lifecycleState

parameters.description: List media objects by registered asset kind. Mutually exclusive with backendId, contentHash, verificationStatus, and lifecycleState.
parameters.name: assetKind

parameters.description: Sort media object list results before pagination. Defaults to backend_object_key to preserve stable repository ordering.
parameters.name: sortBy

parameters.description: Sort direction applied to sortBy before limit and offset are evaluated.
parameters.name: sortOrder

parameters.description: Maximum number of media objects to return. Defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 500.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Zero-based number of filtered media objects to skip before returning this page.
parameters.name: offset

get.summary: List media objects by metadata filter with offset pagination.

post.summary: Register a media object metadata reference.

get.description: Returns metadata-only groups of media objects that share the same content hash, optionally limited to one backend. Does not read media bytes.

parameters.description: Optional backend ID used to limit duplicate detection to one storage backend.
parameters.name: backendId

parameters.description: Minimum number of objects required for a duplicate group. Defaults to 2.
parameters.name: minCopies

get.summary: Find duplicate media objects by content hash.

post.description: Updates only media object lifecycle metadata selected by exactly one metadata filter. Set dryRun to true to preview matched objects and outcomes without persisting changes. Does not delete media bytes or mutate storage backends.
post.summary: Bulk update media object lifecycle metadata.

get.description: Returns metadata-only media object counts for all backends or one backend without reading media bytes.

parameters.description: Optional backend ID used to limit statistics to one storage backend.
parameters.name: backendId

parameters.description: Verify media objects stored on this backend. Mutually exclusive with contentHash.
parameters.name: backendId

parameters.description: Verify media objects with this content hash. Mutually exclusive with backendId.
parameters.name: contentHash

post.summary: Batch verify media object metadata references by backend ID or content hash.

get.summary: Get a media object by ID.

post.description: Updates only metadata lifecycle state and updatedAt. It does not delete media bytes or mutate storage backends.
post.summary: Update a media object lifecycle state.

get.summary: Get the retained metadata timeline for a media object.

post.summary: Verify a media object metadata reference against stored bytes.
Validate and register a storage backend.
Refresh all enabled backend health and supported capacity state.
Validate a backend candidate without persisting it.

get.summary: Read and record backend capacity where supported.

post.summary: Select a backend as default.
Disable a non-default backend.
Run an on-demand backend probe.
Create a user.
Disable a user.
Create a session token from username and password.
Revoke the current session token.

200.description: The API is ready for admin traffic.

503.description: The API is not ready for admin traffic.

get.summary: Get public readiness status for this API process.
Get public build metadata for this API process.

get.description: Full-text search across artists, albums, and tracks. Returns ordered results with artist hits first, then albums, then tracks.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query string (tokenised using the simple text-search dictionary).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query string.

get.description: Returns a newest-first unified timeline of recently created artists, albums, tracks, and playlists. Use kind to filter to one entity type and limit to cap the response size (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional entity kind filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20; values above 100 are clamped.

get.description: Returns a newest-first unified timeline of recently updated artists, albums, tracks, and playlists. Use kind to filter to one entity type and limit to cap the response size (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional entity kind filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20; values above 100 are clamped.

Create a playlist

put.summary: Replace the ordered track list of a playlist

post.summary: Append a track to a playlist

get.summary: List the tracks of a playlist in playlist order

delete.summary: Remove first occurrence of a track from a playlist

404.description: Not found or track not in playlist

post.summary: Relink track to a different media object

200.description: Track with updated media object reference

get.summary: List the tracks of a playlist in playlist order (viewer)

get.description: Returns metadata-only aggregate counts for artists, albums, tracks, and playlists.
Returns per-artist album and track counts derived from catalog metadata.
Returns per-album track counts derived from catalog metadata.
Returns per-playlist track counts derived from catalog metadata.
Returns a newest-first unified timeline of recently created artists, albums, tracks, and playlists. Use kind to filter to one entity type and limit to cap the response size (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional entity kind filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20; values above 100 are clamped.

get.description: Returns a newest-first unified timeline of recently updated artists, albums, tracks, and playlists. Use kind to filter to one entity type and limit to cap the response size (default 20, max 100).

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional entity kind filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 20; values above 100 are clamped.
